title: Vortex Web graphics and runtime update
summary: Vortex Web continues moving toward the new web-client runtime with WebGPU renderer work, improved shadows, and profile cosmetic fixes.
changelog: Started the in-game renderer move to WebGPU.
Added improved cascaded shadows with selectable shadow quality.
Fixed several profile cosmetic and badge selection issues.
Continued moving runtime systems out of the old 2+2 engine files.
